# seerr_jellyfin_settings (Data Source)

Read Seerr Jellyfin settings via /api/v1/settings/jellyfin.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "seerr_jellyfin_settings" "default" {}

output "jellyfin_url_base" {
  value = data.seerr_jellyfin_settings.default.url_base
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `external_hostname` (String) The external hostname for the Jellyfin server.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `ip` (String) The IP address or hostname of the Jellyfin server.
- `jellyfin_forgot_password_url` (String) The URL for forgotten passwords on the Jellyfin server.
- `name` (String) The name of the Jellyfin server.
- `port` (Number) The port of the Jellyfin server.
- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON response body.
- `server_id` (String) The unique server ID of the connected Jellyfin server.
- `status_code` (Number) HTTP status code.
- `url_base` (String) The base URL for the Jellyfin server.
- `use_ssl` (Boolean) Whether to use SSL for the connection.
